summary: Hook System VERIFIED - ALL 19 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Hook A/B testing engine working: POST /api/engagement/hook-event accepts job_id, hook_variant_id, event_type (impression/continue/share/completion). Lock conditions verified: does NOT lock with < 300 impressions, DOES lock when >= 300 impressions AND >= 15% winner margin. A/B serving: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns hook_variant_id for stories with hooks. Updated scoring formula uses hook_strength (0.20 weight). Frontend Dashboard shows hook_text on hero and cards, tracks hook A/B events.
critical_code_review_comments: hook_service.py: Hook generation (3 variants per story, LLM-powered with category-aware templates, weak hook detection + auto-rewrite) - VERIFIED
hook_service.py: A/B testing engine (80% best / 20% exploration when not locked) - VERIFIED
hook_service.py: Lock condition (>= 300 total impressions AND >= 15% winner margin) - VERIFIED
hook_service.py: Evolution (every 100 impressions drop worst, rewrite from best) - VERIFIED
hook_service.py: Hook score formula (0.6 × continue_rate + 0.3 × share_rate + 0.1 × completion_rate) - VERIFIED
engagement.py: POST /api/engagement/hook-event accepts job_id, hook_variant_id, event_type - VERIFIED
engagement.py: Hook event tracking increments impressions/continues/shares/completions per variant - VERIFIED
engagement.py: After lock: hook_locked=true, winning_hook set, hook_text updated to winner text - VERIFIED
engagement.py: Subsequent hook events on locked job return locked=true and skip processing - VERIFIED
engagement.py: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns hook_variant_id for stories with hooks - VERIFIED
pipeline.py: Hook generation stage (_stage_hooks) integrated into pipeline - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Shows hook_text on hero section - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Shows hook_text on story cards - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Tracks hook impression events when card enters viewport (IntersectionObserver) - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: Tracks hook continue events when card is clicked - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test jobs (99f9cd11 locked, 13ddd5d5 unlocked)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hook System fully verified. Key findings: 1) POST /api/engagement/hook-event working for all event types, 2) Lock conditions verified (< 300 = no lock, >= 300 + 15% margin = lock), 3) Locked job 99f9cd11 returns locked=true, 4) A/B serving adds hook_variant_id to stories with hooks, 5) Scoring formula uses hook_strength (0.20 weight), 6) Frontend Dashboard shows hook_text on hero and cards, 7) Frontend tracks hook A/B events via axios POST.

hook_event_tracking.details: Hook events correctly increment impressions/continues/shares/completions per variant

lock_condition_under_300.details: Does NOT lock with < 300 total impressions

lock_condition_over_300_with_margin.details: DOES lock when >= 300 impressions AND winner margin >= 15%

after_lock_behavior.details: hook_locked=true, winning_hook set, hook_text updated to winner text

locked_job_skip_processing.details: Subsequent hook events return locked=true and skip processing

ab_serving_hook_variant_id.details: GET /api/engagement/story-feed returns hook_variant_id for stories with hooks

ab_serving_locked_winner.details: Locked stories always serve winning hook text

scoring_formula_hook_strength.details: Updated formula uses hook_strength (0.20 weight), no continue_rate duplication

cold_start_fallback.details: Stories without hooks use fallback hook from story_text

frontend_hero_hook_text.details: Hero section shows hook_text: 'Every night, an old woman climbed the tallest hill with a bucket of stardust...'

frontend_hook_impression_tracking.details: Dashboard tracks hook impression events when card enters viewport (IntersectionObserver)

frontend_hook_continue_tracking.details: Dashboard tracks hook continue events when card is clicked
